zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth von Jülich於大約1330年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫迪倫爾利時，她的父親Wilhelm von Jülich32歲，母親Jeanne de Hainaut21歲。她於1348年4月3日與John of Kent 3rd Earl of Kent在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。她去世於1411年6月6日在英國肯特文加姆享年82歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾維古姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth von Jülich于大约1330年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫迪倫爾利时，她的父亲Wilhelm von Jülich32岁，母亲Jeanne de Hainaut21岁。她于1348年4月3日与John of Kent 3rd Earl of Kent在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。她去世于1411年6月6日在英国肯特文加姆享年82岁，埋葬在英国哈普爾維古姆。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Jülich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto.

variants.name: Juhl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Arno, Erwin, Heinz, Kurt.

Danish and Norwegian: nickname for someone who was born on Christmas Day or had some other connection with this time of year, from Old Norse jól. This was originally the name of a pagan midwinter festival, which was later appropriated by the Christian Church for celebration of the birth of Christ.
German (of Slavic origin): nickname or topographic name from a Germanized Slavic stem gol ‘naked, barren’.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth von Jülich was born about 1330, in Jülich, Düren, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, her father, Wilhelm von Jülich, was 32 and her mother, Jeanne de Hainaut, was 21. She married John of Kent 3rd Earl of Kent on 3 April 1348, in London, Middlesex, England. She died on 6 June 1411, in Wingham, Kent, England, at the age of 82, and was buried in Winchester, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth von Jülich est née environ 1330, à Jülich, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Wilhelm von Jülich, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Hainaut, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John of Kent 3rd Earl of Kent le 3 avril 1348, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Elle est décédée le 6 juin 1411, à Wingham, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth von Jülich um 1330 in Jülich, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Wilhelm von Jülich 32 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de Hainaut 21. Sie hat am 3. April 1348 in London, Middlesex, England John of Kent 3rd Earl of Kent geheiratet. Sie starb am 6. Juni 1411 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Wingham, Kent, England und wurde in Winchester, Hampshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Jülich è nata il circa 1330 nel Jülich, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, sua padre, Wilhelm von Jülich, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de Hainaut, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John of Kent 3rd Earl of Kent il 3 aprile 1348, nel London, Middlesex, England. Morì il 6 giugno 1411, nel Wingham, Kent, England, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolta a Winchester, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Jülichが約1330年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンドuレンジuリチで生まれた時，父Wilhelm von Jülichは32歳，母Jeanne de Hainautは21歳であった。1348年4月3日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでJohn of Kent 3rd Earl of Kentと結婚した。彼女は1411年6月6日にイギリスケントウィンガムで82歳で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Jülich(이)가 대략 1330년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 드u런 제이u리치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wilhelm von Jülich(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de Hainaut(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1348년 4월 3일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 John of Kent 3rd Earl of Kent(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1411년 6월 6일 영국 켄트 윙함에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 윈체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth von Jülich nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Jülich, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Wilhelm von Jülich, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Hainaut, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John of Kent 3rd Earl of Kent em 3 de abril de 1348, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 6 de junho de 1411, em Wingham, Kent, Inglaterra, com 82 anos, e foi sepultada em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth von Jülich родилась около 1330 г. в местности джuлич, дuрен, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, её отцу по имени Wilhelm von Jülich было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Hainaut, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John of Kent 3rd Earl of Kent 3 апреля 1348 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. Она умерла 6 июня 1411 г. в местности вингхам, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth von Jülich nació aproximadamente 1330, en Jülich, Düren, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Wilhelm von Jülich, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Hainaut, tenía 21 años. Se casó con John of Kent 3rd Earl of Kent el 3 de abril de 1348, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Murió el 6 de junio de 1411, en Wingham, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultada en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
